gates.name: Hosted runtime surface
gates.blocker: Hosted runtime validation must pass against the public URL.

gates.name: Backend Permission API
gates.evidence: Restricted owner-phone request returns one backend decision across WhatsApp, website, mobile, and voice.

gates.name: Eye motion
gates.blocker: The 10-second Eye motion validation must pass.

gates.name: WhatsApp backend ingress
gates.evidence: Hosted ingress and provider webhook route receive WhatsApp-shaped payloads in hold mode.

gates.name: Production auth behavior
gates.blocker: Basic Auth must reject protected routes and keep health public.

gates.name: WhatsApp provider route
gates.evidence: hosted provider webhook route validates token and accepts WhatsApp-shaped payloads in hold mode

gates.name: Custom domain
gates.blocker: Attach the final custom domain before public beta is marked ready.

gates.name: Public beta
gates.blocker: Public beta gate must pass after permanent host, domain, auth, and WhatsApp provider are live.

blockers: Hosted runtime validation must pass against the public URL.
